name: new_pending_membership_notification
description: Notify church admin when a new pending intake submission arrives. No personal data leaves the VPC.

steps.notes: Receives POST from membership-intake with only safe fields.
Calls sanitizer profile 'red-admin-notify'. Fails loudly on any unknown field.
POST to ADMIN_NOTIFY_WEBHOOK with message: 'New pending submission for church <church_id>, id <submission_id>.'
